item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-004","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep and directly drafted a launch announcement for tonight. It treated all-green tests as sufficient for release readiness ('具备上线条件') instead of flagging that tests alone do not establish readiness without rollback, gray/canary rollout, monitoring baselines, or acceptance gates. It did include light post-release validation wording, but did not add a readiness checklist or constrain the announcement language enough to satisfy the framing-audit requirement."}
